description_long: This is a single-story residential house surrounded by a white picket fence and a well-maintained green lawn. The house features a red-tiled gable roof with multiple sections, including a main central structure and a smaller attached wing. The exterior walls are white, and the windows are symmetrically arranged with red trim and decorative shutters. The property includes a paved walkway leading to a prominent front entryway with steps, columns, and a small porch. Several trees and shrubs are distributed around the yard, enhancing the suburban aesthetic and providing shade and privacy.
description: A single-story white house with a red-tiled gable roof, surrounded by a white picket fence, green lawn, and trees. The house features symmetrical windows, a prominent front entryway, and a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, columns, and a porch, as well as the symmetrical window arrangement and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached wing, garage area, and the continuation of the white picket fence and trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the spacious backyard enclosed by the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and more trees along the side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, columns, and decorative overhang
